name: Post-Mortem Writer
description: Compiles the full incident timeline into a blameless post-mortem document following the SRE post-mortem template. Also generates a runbook update.

checks.prompt:
Write a blameless post-mortem document for this incident.

REVIEW OUTCOME: {review_outcome}

Follow this structure:
## Incident Post-Mortem
### Summary (2-3 sentences)
### Impact (users affected, duration, revenue impact estimate)
### Timeline (table: time, event, who)
### Root Cause
### Contributing Factors
### Detection (how was it found? how long before detection?)
### Resolution
### Action Items (table: item, owner, due date, priority)
### Lessons Learned
### Runbook Update

Context: {retryContext}
